creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The distfile doesn't appear to exist on sunsite.  I also checked 
mp3* in case a new version was present, and I checked /incoming/Linux 
(which appears empty).  Can you provide a working master site? 
(Or if you can't, but you have the distfile, send it and I'll put 
it on www.freebsd.org.) 

(Clarification: If you send the distfile, private email is fine.)
